caption: The video captures a formal meeting of the House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs, dated April 12, 2019, focusing on S.23, a bill to increase the minimum wage. The scene is set in a professional environment, likely a committee room, with several individuals seated around a table. A man in a suit appears to be leading the discussion, while others listen attentively. Standing behind them are two women, one dressed in an orange jacket and the other in a beige cardigan over a black top, observing the proceedings. The room is well-organized, featuring bookshelves with various items and a painting on the wall, adding a touch of decor to the otherwise formal setting. The atmosphere suggests a serious and focused discussion on the legislative matter at hand.
